data.title: Tesla Could Touch $2 Trillion Market Cap By End Of 2025, Says Tech Bull: FSD, Robotaxis, And Cybercab 'Keys' For EV Giant
data.description: Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives sees EV giant Tesla achieving a $2 trillion market cap by 2025-end in a bull case scenario.

data.title: Tim Cook Meets PM Keir Starmer Amid Growing Scrutiny Over Apple And Google's Duopoly In UK
data.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook met with U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer to discuss Apple's investments and the U.K.'s tech sector, amidst growing scrutiny over Apple and Google's market dominance and regulatory challenges in the country.

data.title: Why DBV Technologies Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 37%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Quantum-Si Strengthens Global Footprint With Expanded Partner Network
data.description: Quantum-Si expands international distribution network to 15 partners, positioning for continued revenue growth in 2025 and beyond.

data.title: Wall Street Poised To Open Lower A Day After Nasdaq's Record Close Above 20,000: Expert Flags 'Deterioration Under The Surface' As 117 S&P 500 Stocks Hit New Monthly Lows
data.description: U.S. stock futures declined on Thursday in premarket hours after hitting fresh highs on Wednesday. S&P 500, Dow, Nasdaq 100 & R2K were down.
